transcript: Hello my lords, ladies and gentlemen and welcome to NicksRaphsFoodlog. Today we are doing an Italian favorite, that is spaghetti with meatballs in marinara sauce. Let's start with making some Italian meatballs. So we have with us about 500 grams of chicken mince to which I'm going to add oregano, parsley, about a tablespoon of sweet paprika powder, grated parmesan cheese, salt, and crushed black pepper. Mix it all together. Add two whisked eggs. Mix it all up. And finally about 200 grams of breadcrumbs. Mix it all up and now I'm going to oil my hands so that the meat doesn't stick to it. about a tablespoon of chicken mince and roll it to form a meatball now that we're done making these let's fry them up let's get the pan up on medium to high heat and heat up about a quarter to half inch of oil when the oil is heated up we carefully lower in meatballs one at a time cook well on all sides to a golden brown And when they're done, we take them off on some absorbent paper. So I have with me some marinara sauce. It's exactly the same sauce that I made in the lasagna episode. Check the description below for the link. To this, I'm going to be adding the meatballs. Here we go. And mix it all together. And then heat it together. And the meatball marinara sauce is ready so let's cook the spaghetti in a pot I have kept some water which has been salted and oil has been added to it now when this water boils we will add the spaghetti without breaking it in half now that the spaghetti is done we take it off the heat refresh it in some cold water after draining the water in a decanter and rub in just a bit of oil so that it doesn't stick together. And now let's get some grated Parmesan cheese. So there you have it, spaghetti with a meatball marinara sauce, bon appetit!
